'''Fanteel steak''' was a [[Steak/Legends|steak]] eaten by [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoans]]. It was cooked [[fanteel]], a native [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''
